manifest.name: Year Glance

name: Year Glance

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Year Glance v0.1.1

Patch release to fix linter issues for Obsidian community plugin submission.

### Fixes

- Removed unnecessary `async` from `onload`/`onunload` methods
- Removed `console.log` statements (not allowed in community plugins)
- Replaced `element.style.display` with CSS class toggling for better theming compatibility

No functional changes—the plugin works exactly the same as v0.1.0.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Year Glance v0.1.0

Initial release of the Year Glance plugin for Obsidian.

### Features

- **Yearly calendar view** - Render a full year at a glance using `year_glance` code blocks
- **Two layout options**
  - `3x4` - Traditional 3×4 month grid
  - `12-rows` - One month per row, days aligned by weekday
- **Two display styles**
  - `compact` - Minimal indicators with hover tooltips
  - `expanded` - Event text visible directly on calendar with spanning bars
- **Event categories** - Group events with `@CategoryName` syntax
- **Custom colors** - Assign colors per category with `@Category [#hexcolor]` or use auto-assigned palette
- **Date formats** - Single day (`20260715`) or date ranges (`20260601-20260608`)
- **Today indicator** - Diamond marker highlighting current date (configurable)
- **Week start** - Choose Sunday or Monday as first day of week

### Example

````markdown
```year_glance
---
year: 2026
layout: 12-rows
style: expanded
---

@Trips [#e63946]
- 20260601-20260608: Conference

@Deadlines [#457b9d]
- 20260731: Project milestone
```
````
